title: chamaecrista cathartica
intro: Chamaecrista cathartica, also known as sensitive plant or sensitive parasol, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Africa and Asia and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. Chamaecrista cathartica is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used in traditional remedies like poultices and salves to treat various health conditions.
